questions.explanation: The origin is the point where x-axis and y-axis intersect. Its coordinates are (0, 0).

questions.text: In the point (3, 5), 3 is the x-coordinate.
questions.explanation: In coordinates (x, y), the first number is x-coordinate (abscissa), second is y-coordinate (ordinate).

questions.correctAnswer: A graph that uses bars of uniform width to represent data.
questions.explanation: Bar graphs use rectangular bars where height/length represents the value of data.

questions.text: The horizontal line in a graph is called ________ axis.
questions.explanation: The horizontal line is x-axis, vertical line is y-axis.
